content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
RISK-ON: low volatility (Vol: 23.1%) and broad participation (Breadth: 6/8 sectors positive).

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Transportation led by TAVHL (1W: +9.48% | 1M: +4.82%) ABOVE TREND; Retail & Food led by SOKM (1W: +8.03% | 1M: -14.74%) RECOVERY and ULKER (1W: +5.11% | 1M: -1.35%) RECOVERY; Energy & Chemicals led by TUPRS (1W: +6.13% | 1M: +15.03%) ABOVE TREND.

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Technology & Telecom is weak with KONTR (1W: -10.07% | 1M: -9.44%) BELOW TREND; Holding & Investment lagging with DOHOL (1W: -8.12% | 1M: -2.11%) BELOW TREND and KCHOL (1W: -0.67% | 1M: +4.39%) CORRECTION.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
TAVHL (1W: +9.48% | 1M: +4.82%) ABOVE TREND; KRDMD (1W: +8.50% | 1M: +6.12%) ABOVE TREND; SOKM (1W: +8.03% | 1M: -14.74%) RECOVERY; TRALT (1W: +7.06% | 1M: -15.80%) RECOVERY; TUPRS (1W: +6.13% | 1M: +15.03%) ABOVE TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: -10.07% | 1M: -9.44%) BELOW TREND; DOHOL (1W: -8.12% | 1M: -2.11%) BELOW TREND; TOASO (1W: -5.54% | 1M: -2.60%) BELOW TREND; FROTO (1W: -4.05% | 1M: -4.44%) BELOW TREND; CCOLA (1W: -2.71% | 1M: -3.48%) BELOW TREND.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
TAVHL (1W: +9.48% | 1M: +4.82%) ABOVE TREND; KRDMD (1W: +8.50% | 1M: +6.12%) ABOVE TREND; SOKM (1W: +8.03% | 1M: -14.74%) RECOVERY; TRALT (1W: +7.06% | 1M: -15.80%) RECOVERY; TUPRS (1W: +6.13% | 1M: +15.03%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Banks showing short-term bounce but mixed fundamentals: GARAN (1W: +4.51% | 1M: -4.62%) RECOVERY, ISCTR (1W: +4.03% | 1M: -7.35%) RECOVERY, AKBNK (1W: +2.77% | 1M: -9.56%) RECOVERY; HALKB (1W: -0.76% | 1M: -13.95%) BELOW TREND is a downside risk.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Heavy industry mixed: KRDMD (1W: +8.50% | 1M: +6.12%) ABOVE TREND and EREGL (1W: +4.66% | 1M: +1.18%) ABOVE TREND lead, while FROTO (1W: -4.05% | 1M: -4.44%) BELOW TREND and TOASO (1W: -5.54% | 1M: -2.60%) BELOW TREND lag.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Energy showing strength and momentum: TUPRS (1W: +6.13% | 1M: +15.03%) ABOVE TREND and SASA (1W: +1.72% | 1M: +3.49%) ABOVE TREND, offset by SISE (1W: -1.96% | 1M: +6.74%) CORRECTION and TRALT (1W: +7.06% | 1M: -15.80%) RECOVERY.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Risk-on stance: overweight cyclicals—transportation, energy and select heavy industry names; trim technology and holding names showing structural weakness; keep tactical cash for pullbacks into RECOVERY names.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
TUPRS (1W: +6.13% | 1M: +15.03%) ABOVE TREND; TAVHL (1W: +9.48% | 1M: +4.82%) ABOVE TREND; KRDMD (1W: +8.50% | 1M: +6.12%) ABOVE TREND; GARAN (1W: +4.51% | 1M: -4.62%) RECOVERY; KONTR (1W: -10.07% | 1M: -9.44%) BELOW TREND.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Transportation, Retail & Food, Energy & Chemicals.

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
XU100: monitor holding of short-term support (near-term -2% band) and a break above recent 1M highs (~+3–5%) to confirm continuation; catalysts: CBRT liquidity guidance, global risk appetite, oil prices, and Q1 corporate updates.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON market driven by low volatility (23.1%) and broad sector participation (6/8 positive), favoring cyclicals and commodity-exposed names. Key opportunities in transportation and energy (TAVHL, TUPRS, KRDMD); main risks are tech and holding names (KONTR, DOHOL) and any reversal in global risk sentiment.
